name: Readmission Labs — Recurrent / Progressed PE
facility: University of Maryland Medical Center — ED Lab

results.name: Troponin I
results.interpretation: NEW elevation (was negative on the prior admission) — indicates right-ventricular myocardial strain.

results.name: Coag — aPTT
results.interpretation: Therapeutic on the heparin infusion started in the ED.
results.notes: Baseline (drawn before the heparin infusion was started).

interpretation: New troponin elevation and elevated BNP in the setting of progressed bilateral PE indicate right-ventricular strain — intermediate-risk (submassive) PE. Normal lactate and preserved blood pressure argue against high-risk/massive PE at this moment. Renal function normal. Now therapeutically anticoagulated on heparin.
